recommendations.title: Alien Nation
recommendations.overview: A few years from now, Earth will have the first contact with an alien civilization. These aliens, known as Newcomers, slowly begin to be integrated into human society after years of quarantine.

recommendations.title: Freaks of Nature
recommendations.overview: In the town of Dillford, humans, vampires and zombies were all living in peace - until the alien apocalypse arrived. Now three teenagers-one human, one vampire, and one zombie-have to team up to figure out how to get rid of the visitors.

recommendations.title: Choose Love
recommendations.overview: The steady boyfriend. The one who got away. The charming rock star. Who will Cami choose? In this interactive rom-com, her love life is in your hands.

recommendations.title: Inuyashiki
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged office worker encounters aliens and is gifted with alien technology and limitless powers.

recommendations.title: What Planet Are You From?
recommendations.overview: A human-looking alien from a highly advanced but emotionless all-male society is sent to Earth to impregnate a woman and bring the child back to their planet. The alien ends up falling in love while a suspicious FAA agent tails him.

recommendations.title: Return of the Killer Tomatoes!
recommendations.overview: Crazy old Professor Gangreen has developed a way to make tomatoes look human for a second invasion.

recommendations.title: Meet Dave
recommendations.overview: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form. While trying to save their planet, the aliens encounter a new problem, as their ship becomes smitten with an Earth woman.

recommendations.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkaar
recommendations.overview: To earn extra cash, Mickey helps couples break up — but life gets complicated when he falls for Tinni, a career woman with an independent streak.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Voyage of the Damned
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, TV Movie, Mystery, Drama, Thriller
recommendations.overview: When disaster hits the Titanic, the Doctor uncovers a threat to the whole human race. Battling alongside aliens, saboteurs, robot Angels and a new friend called Astrid, can he stop the Christmas inferno?

recommendations.title: Tomcats
recommendations.overview: College buddies chip in and promise that the group's last unmarried man will collect a cash pot. Seven years later, the kitty is worth $500,000 -- money Michael needs to pay a gambling debt. Problem is, the only other single guy is a hopeless womaniz
